pr.title: Record: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking + Polar Express — 82.14ms/step (3.1% faster than PR #315)

output.summary: Optimizer overhaul swaps per-layer weights for contiguous banks, uses Polar Express orthogonalization, and coordinates Parallel Muon comm+PE overlap.
techniques: Contiguous 3D parameter banks replacing 66 nn.Linear weights
Polar Express minimax polynomials for tighter orthogonalization
Parallel Muon async reduce-scatter and PE scheduling for bank gradients
